name: Tax-Free Withdrawal for Foreign Embassies and Legations

eligibility.description: Limited to foreign governments, organizations, and individuals entitled to diplomatic tax-free privileges in the United States.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows distilled spirits to be withdrawn from bonded premises or customs bonded warehouses free of tax for the official or family use of foreign governments and authorized individuals.
